name: Take a Photo with Camera
description: Open the iPhone Camera app and take a standard photo using the shutter button.
steps: [{"step":1,"instruction":"Unlock your iPhone and find the Camera app.","target":"Camera app icon","location":"Home screen or lock screen shortcut","icon":"camera","validation":"Ask if the Camera app is open.","secondary_anchor":"Look for a gray icon with a camera image on it."},{"step":2,"instruction":"Point the phone at what you want to photograph.","target":"Camera preview","location":"Center of the screen","icon":"viewfinder","validation":"Ask if the subject is visible on the screen.","secondary_anchor":"Move the phone slowly until the person or object appears on the screen."},{"step":3,"instruction":"Tap the large white shutter button once to take the photo.","target":"Shutter button","location":"Bottom center of the screen","icon":"circle","validation":"Ask if they heard a click or saw the image capture.","secondary_anchor":"It looks like a large white circle at the bottom of the camera screen."}]

name: Send Money with Zelle
description: Use the Bank of America app to send money to an existing recipient with Zelle.
steps: [{"step":1,"instruction":"Open the Bank of America app and sign in if needed.","target":"Bank of America app","location":"Home screen","icon":"bank","validation":"Ask if the account overview screen is visible.","secondary_anchor":"Look for the red Bank of America icon."},{"step":2,"instruction":"Tap Pay & Transfer.","target":"Pay & Transfer tab","location":"Main navigation or menu","icon":"arrows","validation":"Ask if the payment options screen opened.","secondary_anchor":"Look for words like Pay, Transfer, or Move Money."},{"step":3,"instruction":"Tap Send Money with Zelle.","target":"Zelle option","location":"Payment options list","icon":"zelle","validation":"Ask if the Zelle screen is open.","secondary_anchor":"Look for the word Zelle in purple lettering."},{"step":4,"instruction":"Choose the person you want to pay from your existing contacts.","target":"Recipient list","location":"Middle of the screen","icon":"person","validation":"Ask if the correct person is selected.","secondary_anchor":"Tap the contact name of the person you already saved."},{"step":5,"instruction":"Enter the amount and tap Continue.","target":"Amount field","location":"Center of the screen","icon":"dollar","validation":"Ask if the amount review screen appeared.","secondary_anchor":"Type only the number of dollars you want to send."},{"step":6,"instruction":"Review the details and tap Send.","target":"Send button","location":"Bottom of the review screen","icon":"send","validation":"Ask if the app confirmed the payment was sent.","secondary_anchor":"Look for a button that says Send or Confirm at the bottom." }]

name: Check Voicemail
description: Open the Phone app and listen to voicemail messages on an iPhone.
steps: [{"step":1,"instruction":"Open the Phone app.","target":"Phone app icon","location":"Home screen or dock","icon":"phone","validation":"Ask if the Phone app is open.","secondary_anchor":"Look for a green icon with a white phone handset."},{"step":2,"instruction":"Tap Voicemail.","target":"Voicemail tab","location":"Bottom right of the screen","icon":"voicemail","validation":"Ask if the voicemail list is visible.","secondary_anchor":"It is usually one of the tabs at the bottom of the Phone app."},{"step":3,"instruction":"Tap the message you want to hear, then tap Play.","target":"Play button","location":"Inside the selected voicemail","icon":"play","validation":"Ask if the message is playing.","secondary_anchor":"Look for a triangle play button next to the message controls."}]

name: Join a Zoom Meeting from Email
description: Open a Zoom meeting link from email and join the meeting.
steps: [{"step":1,"instruction":"Open the Mail app and find the email with the Zoom invitation.","target":"Mail app","location":"Home screen","icon":"mail","validation":"Ask if the invitation email is open.","secondary_anchor":"Look for the blue Mail icon with a white envelope."},{"step":2,"instruction":"Tap the Zoom meeting link in the email.","target":"Meeting link","location":"Inside the email body","icon":"link","validation":"Ask if Zoom opened or a prompt appeared.","secondary_anchor":"The link is usually blue and may say Join Zoom Meeting."},{"step":3,"instruction":"If prompted, tap Open or Join.","target":"Open/Join prompt","location":"Popup or Zoom screen","icon":"join","validation":"Ask if they can see the meeting preview or join screen.","secondary_anchor":"Choose the button that opens the Zoom app, not the browser if possible."},{"step":4,"instruction":"Tap Join Meeting.","target":"Join Meeting button","location":"Bottom of the Zoom screen","icon":"video","validation":"Ask if they entered the meeting.","secondary_anchor":"Look for a blue button labeled Join Meeting." }]

name: Send a Text Message
description: Open the Messages app and send a new text message to an existing contact.
steps: [{"step":1,"instruction":"Open the Messages app.","target":"Messages app icon","location":"Home screen","icon":"messages","validation":"Ask if the conversation list is visible.","secondary_anchor":"Look for a green icon with a white speech bubble."},{"step":2,"instruction":"Tap the compose button to start a new message.","target":"Compose button","location":"Top right of the screen","icon":"square-pencil","validation":"Ask if the new message screen opened.","secondary_anchor":"Look for a small square with a pencil."},{"step":3,"instruction":"Type the contact's name in the To field and select the correct person.","target":"To field","location":"Top of the new message screen","icon":"person","validation":"Ask if the contact name now appears in the To line.","secondary_anchor":"Type just the first few letters of their name."},{"step":4,"instruction":"Tap the message box and type your message.","target":"Message box","location":"Bottom of the screen","icon":"text","validation":"Ask if the message text is visible.","secondary_anchor":"Tap the long white field above the keyboard."},{"step":5,"instruction":"Tap the blue send arrow.","target":"Send button","location":"Right side of the message box","icon":"arrow-up","validation":"Ask if the message bubble appeared in the conversation.","secondary_anchor":"Look for a blue circle with an upward arrow." }]

name: Turn On Flashlight
description: Open Control Center on an iPhone and turn on the flashlight.
steps: [{"step":1,"instruction":"Open Control Center by swiping down from the top-right corner of the screen.","target":"Control Center","location":"Top-right gesture area","icon":"control-center","validation":"Ask if a panel of quick controls appeared.","secondary_anchor":"Place your finger at the very top-right edge and swipe downward."},{"step":2,"instruction":"Tap the flashlight icon once.","target":"Flashlight button","location":"Inside Control Center","icon":"flashlight","validation":"Ask if the flashlight turned on.","secondary_anchor":"Look for a small flashlight symbol among the buttons."}]
